items.headline: MiSTer Companion v3.9.4 Released
items.message:
MiSTer Companion v3.9.4 is now available.

This update improves the RetroAchievement Cores installer.

RetroAchievement Cores now use the MGL launcher method instead of the old separate MiSTer_RA.ini setup. RA cores are launched from the new _RA_Cores folder using dedicated .mgl launchers.

Existing installs using the old MiSTer_RA.ini method can be migrated automatically from the Extras tab.

Special thanks to sage2050, whose MiSTer_RA script served as the basis for this new install method.

The stable MiSTer main binary and stable cores remain untouched.

You can download the latest stable release below.

items.headline: Help Bring MiSTer Companion to macOS
items.message:
macOS support is now being actively worked on, with recent improvements contributed by DoggyChicken.

To continue improving and properly maintain macOS support long-term, having access to a Mac for development and testing is still essential. At the moment, I rely on community contributions and am unable to test macOS-specific changes directly.

If you'd like to help make this possible, consider supporting the Ko-fi goal below.
